source_authorization: Authorize P213D 3_STAR/4_STAR positional schema and code fix design (read-only design doc, no DB write)

current_root_cause.summary: database.py:463 sorts all numbers unconditionally regardless of isPermutation flag; csv_validator.py already preserves draw order for permutation games but that order is discarded before DB storage
current_root_cause.preservation_code: final_numbers = numbers if is_permutation else sorted(numbers)
current_root_cause.existing_rows_unrecoverable_reason: DB stores sorted arrays; n! orderings possible without raw source; historical CSV/TXT files not in repo
current_root_cause.current_db_sample: [5, 6, 9] — sorted; original draw order is lost

evidence_summary.csv_validator_permutation_preservation: lottery_api/utils/csv_validator.py:286,451-452 — final_numbers = numbers if is_permutation else sorted(numbers)
evidence_summary.mock_debug_draw_order_evidence: lottery_api/tools/debug_validator.py and debug_comprehensive.py — 開出順序 field present in mock source format
evidence_summary.db_sorted_row_confirmation: sqlite3 query: SELECT numbers FROM draws WHERE lottery_type='3_STAR' LIMIT 10 → [5, 6, 9], [0, 6, 7], [1, 5, 9] — all sorted

design_options.name: Modify draws.numbers to not sort permutation games
design_options.description: Change database.py:463 to check isPermutation before sorting; store draw order in existing numbers field for permutation games
design_options.breaking_reason: Column semantics change for permutation games; mixed sorted/unsorted state in same column for existing vs new rows
design_options.migration_impact: existing 4179 3_STAR + 2922 4_STAR rows remain sorted; new rows use draw order — ambiguous column semantics
design_options.recommendation_reason: Not recommended; creates ambiguous column semantics and potential consumer breakage

design_options.name: Add separate nullable numbers_positional column
design_options.description: ADD COLUMN numbers_positional TEXT DEFAULT NULL to draws; permutation games write draw order here; non-permutation games leave NULL; numbers column unchanged
design_options.schema_change: ALTER TABLE draws ADD COLUMN numbers_positional TEXT DEFAULT NULL
design_options.migration_impact: non-destructive ADD COLUMN; existing rows get NULL; historical rows need re-ingestion to populate
design_options.recommendation_reason: Safe option; recommended as base; Option C extends it with stricter enforcement

design_options.name: Dual-write canonical sorted numbers plus original positional sequence
design_options.description: Same structure as Option B; numbers always stores sorted canonical order; numbers_positional always stores draw order for permutation games; enforced via application logic (and optionally a CHECK constraint)
design_options.schema_change: ALTER TABLE draws ADD COLUMN numbers_positional TEXT DEFAULT NULL
design_options.migration_impact: same as Option B; historical rows remain NULL until re-ingested from source
design_options.recommendation_reason: Best long-term design; backward compatible; explicit policy prevents future ambiguity; csv_validator is already correct

design_options.name: No change / HOLD
design_options.description: Keep current behavior; numbers stores sorted arrays; no positional field; straight-play research remains blocked
design_options.recommendation_reason: Default safe option if straight-play research is not a current priority

recommended_option_rationale: Option C is additive (non-destructive ADD COLUMN), backward compatible, preserves existing numbers semantics for all lottery types, and enforces clear dual-write policy. csv_validator is already correct; only database.py needs one-line change. No existing consumers break.
